title: Dating Web
description: Key design elements for dating, matchmaking, community, and consumer social dashboard experiences.

question_templates.question: 这是约会、婚恋、兴趣社群，还是更泛的社交匹配产品？
主要用户是谁？他们最关心效率、安全、真实感，还是趣味性？
核心匹配目标是什么：同城约会、长期关系、兴趣社交、职业 networking，还是其他？
用户主要动作有哪些：浏览资料、喜欢、聊天、筛选、举报、订阅？

defaults.output_contract: standalone responsive HTML dating or matchmaking interface
defaults.primary_user: growth or community operator improving matchmaking quality and user trust
defaults.business_domain: dating and social matching product operations
defaults.decision_goal: understand match quality, user intent, and safety signals to improve conversion and trust
defaults.visual_direction: modern social product dashboard with profile-rich cards, warm accents, and explicit trust indicators
